title: SuperSeriousLab/TeleTUI.jl
description: AI-agent-first Julia TUI framework — hard fork of Tachikoma.jl with FRANK instrumentation, ET-Transport, and agent attach API

title: SynapCores/synapcores-agent
description: Real, framework-free AI support agent where SynapCores is the brain — memory, RAG, tool routing, generation in one database. Browser chat widget + live Brain debug sidebar. Fork and run in 30s.

title: alanlesc1/idempiere-ai
description: This plugin serves as the AI core for the iDempiere. It acts as a **Central Orchestrator**, connecting the user interface to Large Language Models (LLMs) and enabling the AI to perform real-world actions within the ERP through automated tools.

title: xxxihrmn/llmops
description: 🚀 Discover top tools and resources for Large Language Model Operations (LLMOps) to enhance your workflow and boost productivity.

title: Ashok007-cmd/Production-Grade-RAG
description: A modular, extensible Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system built for production, with three progressive phases of sophistication.

title: asadali031/ai-studies
description: 🤖 Build professional AI systems from scratch with a complete roadmap for Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) studies and applications.

title: kamalrss88/FlashMLA
description: 🚀 Accelerate attention mechanisms with FlashMLA, featuring optimized kernels for DeepSeek models, enhancing performance through sparse and dense attention.

title: aymanelrody/FlashMLA
description: ⚡ Optimize attention mechanisms with FlashMLA, a library of advanced sparse and dense kernels for DeepSeek models, improving performance and efficiency.

title: Ask HN: Flag/gray out comments complaining about AI/LLM use in posts/comments?
description:
It's getting tedious. Predictably devolves into "How do you know it's AI/LLM?" & "I know because of these tells..."Reminds me of years past and constant litany of complaints about paywalls. Such comments have for the most part disappeared.

Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48376612
Points: 3
